args.message: Welcome to our lot! You're looking at a fantastic 2017 Nissan Altima SV, a well-maintained sedan with power features, dual-zone climate control, and Bluetooth connectivity. It has a clean interior and runs great, making it a perfect choice for anyone in need of a reliable and fuel-efficient car. At an asking price of just $11,495, this beauty is priced to move! Ready for a test drive?
